received much information about classes, scholarships and financial aid CCC from María López.

Thank you very much, María, for coming English class and for making the presentation.

Seoladh Comórtas Bonn Óir Seán Riada bhliain 2009 agus shin leith dul neart neart.
comórtas oscailte d’aon duine aon áit domhan.
Reachtáiltear via suíomh idirlínne Cuireadh Chun Ceoil agus trí RnaG.
don ceoltóir fearr uirlis áirithe comortas.
féidir leis iomathóir clárú suiomh idirlinne.
Ansan mór don iomathóir fuaimrian sheinnt gan tionlacan iad lódáil suíomh.
seo léir saor aisce.
Craoltar píosaí ceoil gach seachtain Raidió Gaeltachta, agus bíonn ceolchoirm bheo ina mbíonn iomaitheoir deireanach páirteach siúl, beo aer, óstán gCorcaigh thús bliana.
Bronntar Bonn Óir agus Sparán bhfuil luach €2500 orthu mbuaiteóir.
Níl ach uirlis gceist aghaidh blaina: 2012 Fidil, 2011 Feadóga, 2012 Cláirseach Píob, 2013 uirlisí giolcaigh miotail (Boscaí ceoil, concairtín 7rl) 2014 tharnasi chun Fidil agus mar sin de.
The Seán Riada Gold Medal competition was launched 2009 and has been gathering strength every year since.
The competition open anyone anywhere the world.
for the best Irish Traditional Musician particular instrument given year.
organised via the internet site Cuireadh Chun Ceoil and music from the competitors broadcast season RnaG and world wide vie the internet.
The competitor may enter for free and must upload files themselves playing unaccompanied.
The final are chosen adjudicators and they are brought, January the following year, Cork city where they compete live radio.
The Gold Medal and purse €2,500 awarded the winner.
One instrument the chosen disepline every year and these are rota: 2010 The fiddle, 2011 The flutes and whistles, 2012 The Harp and the Pipes, 2013 The metal reed instruments (Accordian, concertina etc.)
2014 back the fidil and on.

research focuses using massive coral species (Orbicella faveolata and Siderastraea siderea) reconsturct paleo-climates and

She completed Master Science program the College Marine Science, University South Florida, August, 2008.
Thesis: 1400 year multi-proxy record hydrologic variability the Gulf Mexico: Exploring ocean-continent linkages during the Late Holocene.
